user.title: Connect to LG ThinQ
user.description: Enter your LG ThinQ Personal Access Token (PAT). You can generate one at https://connect-client.developer.lge.com/ under "My Apps" → "PAT".

data_description.pat: The PAT issued from the LG ThinQ developer portal. Keep it secret.
data_description.region: The country where your LG account is registered.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with LG ThinQ
reauth_confirm.description: Your Personal Access Token has expired or been revoked. Please enter a new PAT.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to LG ThinQ. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_pat: The Personal Access Token was rejected. Verify the token is correct and has not expired.
error.no_devices: Authentication succeeded but no ThinQ devices were found on this account.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This LG ThinQ account is already configured.
abort.no_smartthinq_devices: No supported LG ThinQ devices were found.
abort.unsupported_version: This integration requires Home Assistant {req_ver} or newer. You are running {run_ver}.
